commands.cmd: audit migrations 0016/0017, schema mappings, record services/tests, privacy/access domains and active external ownership

summary: Approved normalized persistence historical integrity and an exact seven-file next package for real scrypt-backed Nutrition principals, private profiles, append-only permission versions, versioned goals, immutable measurements, access-version revocation, optimistic profile updates and focused tests. Household profiles remain attribution-only; routes/UI/intake are deferred to a privacy review.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
